zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
Solana当前价格围绕67.89震荡，日内波动极窄，整体仍处于均线下方弱势整理格局，多空僵持短线方向不明等待突破确认信号

MACD指标处于-0.64附近维持零轴下方，空头动能仍占优势；价格低于SMA20(68.21)，短期均线压制明显，反弹持续性不足

下方支撑关注67.65前低，上方阻力集中68.09及68.21附近，若有效突破均线或打开上行空间进一步确认趋势为关键区间

操作上建议保持区间交易思路，未有效站上68.21前以反弹做空为主，若跌破67.65则可能加速下探，控制仓位并严格止损执行

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US Dollar is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 67.89, following a brief rejection near the 68.09 intraday high. Price action remains slightly subdued, with the market struggling to reclaim the 20-day simple moving average at 68.21. Overall structure suggests a mild corrective bias rather than a strong directional trend, as momentum has flattened and volatility has compressed within a narrow intraday range.

Momentum indicators reinforce a weakening short-term outlook, with MACD printing a negative reading of -0.649 indicating persistent bearish pressure. The absence of an RSI value limits overbought or oversold confirmation, but price trading below the 20-day SMA at 68.21 still signals short-term weakness. The market lacks bullish divergence, suggesting buyers have yet to regain meaningful control despite minor intraday rebounds and overall momentum remains tilted to the downside structure slightly.

Key support is forming around the 67.65–67.50 zone, aligning with recent intraday lows and acting as the immediate defense for bulls. A breakdown below this area could expose deeper downside momentum toward the mid-67s. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at 68.09, followed by stronger confluence at the 20-day SMA near 68.21, which continues to cap recovery attempts. Market structure suggests breakout confirmation only above SMA resistance level.

From a trading perspective, short-term bias remains cautiously bearish unless price can reclaim the 68.20–68.30 resistance zone with strong volume. Intraday traders may consider range-bound strategies, selling near resistance and taking partial profits near support. However, breakdowns below 67.65 could accelerate downside pressure. Risk management remains crucial, with tight stops recommended given the compressed volatility and potential for sudden breakout moves in either direction until volatility expands more decisively again.
